AttributeList.Code: ' Codex closed-loop import/export verification. ' Keep the object name and the generated Sub name identical: Codex_VBFunction_Loop. SmartTags("Codex_VBS_Input") = "IN_OK" SmartTags("Codex_VBS_Output") = "OUT_OK"
AttributeList.Name: Codex_VBFunction_Loop

body.p: Codex VBS import/export loop test. Object name and Sub name must match.
